scripts.deploy:dry: npm run build:analytics && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.toml --dry-run
scripts.deploy: npm run build:analytics && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:python: npm run build:analytics && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.python.toml
scripts.deploy:python:dry: npm run build:analytics && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.python.toml --dry-run
scripts.deploy:both: npm run deploy && npm run deploy:python
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:worker && npm run typecheck:analytics
